name: trustgraph-flow

metadata.name: trustgraph-flow
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 or later (GPLv3+)
metadata.summary: TrustGraph provides a means to run a pipeline of flexible AI processing components in a flexible means to achieve a processing pipeline.

documentation: See https://trustgraph.ai/

null.  Output is a list of triples.

documentation: !/usr/bin/env python3

modules.name: trustgraph.extract.object.row.extract
documentation:
Simple decoder, accepts vector+text chunks input, applies analysis to pull
out a row of fields.  Output as a vector plus object.

documentation:
Simple RAG service, performs query using document RAG an LLM.

modules.name: trustgraph.extract.kg.relationships.__main__
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python3

modules.name: trustgraph.extract.kg.topics.extract
documentation:
Simple decoder, accepts embeddings+text chunks input, applies entity analysis to
get entity definitions which are output as graph edges.

modules.name: trustgraph.extract.kg.definitions.__main__
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python3

modules.name: trustgraph.agent.react.tools
documentation: This tool implementation knows how to put a question to the graph RAG
service

classes.name: trustgraph.agent.react.tools.TextCompletionImpl
documentation: This tool implementation knows how to do text completion.  This uses
the prompt service, rather than talking  to TextCompletion directly.

modules.name: trustgraph.extract.kg.relationships.extract
documentation:
Simple decoder, accepts vector+text chunks input, applies entity
relationship analysis to get entity relationship edges which are output as
graph edges.

modules.name: trustgraph.extract.kg.definitions.extract
documentation:
Simple decoder, accepts embeddings+text chunks input, applies entity analysis to
get entity definitions which are output as graph edges.
